channel.title: Problem installing frontity on MAC OS Ventura chip M1
channel.description:
Hello, I need your help please, I have tried everything
when i try to install Frontity on my iMac M1 with node v18.14.1, npm 9.3.1 , Homebrew 4.0.1 and Rosetta 2 but it doesn't initialize and gives me the following error by console
Error: error:0308010C:digital envelope routines::not supported in the new hash (node: internal/crypto/hash: 71:19) at Object.createHash(node:crypto:133:10) in module.exports (/Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/webpack/lib/util/createHash.js:135:53) at NormalModule._initBuildHash (/Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/webpack/lib/NormalModule.js:417:16) at handleParseError(/Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/webpack/lib/NormalModule.js:471:10) at /Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/webpack/lib/NormalModule.js:503:5 at /Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/webpack/lib/NormalModule.js:358:12 at /Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/loader-runner/lib/LoaderRunner.js:373:3 at iterateNormalLoaders(/Users/user1/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/loader-runner/lib/LoaderRunner.js:214:10) at iterateNormalLoaders(/Users/user1/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/loader-runner/lib/LoaderRunner.js:221:10)

item.title: Problem installing frontity on MAC OS Ventura chip M1
item.dc:creator: ni.bonev
item.description:
Its not related to M1. You cant use node18 with frontity. You need to use node 16.x and the issue should be solved.
Good luck

Read full topic
item.source: Problem installing frontity on MAC OS Ventura chip M1

item.title: Problem installing frontity on MAC OS Ventura chip M1
item.dc:creator: m.paillalef.c
item.description:
Hello, I need your help please, I have tried everything

when i try to install Frontity on my iMac M1 with node v18.14.1, npm 9.3.1 , Homebrew 4.0.1 and Rosetta 2 but it doesn’t initialize and gives me the following error by console

Error: error:0308010C:digital envelope routines::not supported
in the new hash (node: internal/crypto/hash: 71:19)
at Object.createHash(node:crypto:133:10)
in module.exports (/Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/webpack/lib/util/createHash.js:135:53)
at NormalModule._initBuildHash (/Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/webpack/lib/NormalModule.js:417:16)
at handleParseError(/Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/webpack/lib/NormalModule.js:471:10)
at /Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/webpack/lib/NormalModule.js:503:5
at /Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/webpack/lib/NormalModule.js:358:12
at /Users/user/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/loader-runner/lib/LoaderRunner.js:373:3
at iterateNormalLoaders(/Users/user1/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/loader-runner/lib/LoaderRunner.js:214:10)
at iterateNormalLoaders(/Users/user1/Desktop/my-app/node_modules/@frontity/core/node_modules/loader-runner/lib/LoaderRunner.js:221:10)

Read full topic
item.source: Problem installing frontity on MAC OS Ventura chip M1
